title: Transverse Aortic Constriction in Mice
author: Lin Zhong
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6xdhfi6
materials: Mice are anesthetized with pentobarbital (50 mg.kg, IP).

steps.title: The ventral neck and left parasternal...
steps.instruction: The ventral neck and left parasternal region is shaved and disinfected with Betadine followed by 70% alcohol.

steps.title: The mouse is positioned supine on...
steps.instruction: The mouse is positioned supine on a heating pad and a small incision is made through the skin underlying the trachea.

steps.title: The trachea is exposed, a small...
steps.instruction: The trachea is exposed, a small puncture is made in the trachea, and endotracheal intubation is performed using a PE-50 tube.

steps.title: The endotracheal tube is connected to...
steps.instruction: The endotracheal tube is connected to a small rodent ventilator (Harvard Apparatus) for mechanical ventilation of the mouse.

steps.title: With the use of a surgical...
steps.instruction: With the use of a surgical microscope, a left thoracotomy is performed and the second intercostal space is entered using scissors and blunt dissection to expose the aortic arch.

steps.title: A 27G blunt needle is placed...
steps.instruction: A 27G blunt needle is placed parallel to the transverse aorta between the innominate and left common carotid arteries. A 7-0 ligature is placed around the transverse aorta and needle and tied.

steps.title: The needle is removed to yield...
steps.instruction: The needle is removed to yield a transverse aortic constriction (TAC) of ~0.4 mm in diameter. In sham mice, the entire procedure is identical except for the ligation of the aorta.

steps.title: The chest is closed in layers with 7-0 sutures
steps.instruction: The chest is closed in layers with 7-0 sutures.

steps.title: The mouse is gradually weaned from...
steps.instruction: The mouse is gradually weaned from the ventilator to resolve any possible pneumothorax.

steps.title: Once spontaneous respiration resumes, the endothracheal...
steps.instruction: Once spontaneous respiration resumes, the endothracheal tube is removed and the trachea is closed with 8-0 suture. The skin is then closed with 6-0 suture.

steps.title: The mouse is maintained on the...
steps.instruction: The mouse is maintained on the heating pad until fully recovered from anesthesia.

steps.title: Buprenorphine is administered SC immediately following...
steps.instruction: Buprenorphine is administered SC immediately following surgery and every 8-12 hr for 72 hr.

steps.title: One day following the TAC procedure,...
steps.instruction: One day following the TAC procedure, the mouse is subjected to Doppler echocardiography (Vevo2100) to determine the degree of stenosis induced by the ligation.
